channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Roosters hold off Broncos’ second‑half fight to win 38‑24 in Round 9 thriller
item.description: The Sydney Roosters extended their winning streak to five games with a hard‑fought 38‑24 victory over the Brisbane Broncos in a Saturday night blockbuster at Allianz Stadium. The Roosters raced to a d...

item.title: Austrian Man Arrested Over Rat Poison in Baby Food Jars
item.description: In a concerning case from Austria, authorities have arrested a 39-year-old man on suspicion of contaminating jars of baby food with rat poison, apparently as part of an extortion attempt. The suspect ...

item.title: Former Nairobi Governor Sonko to Face Defence in 2018 County Tender Corruption Case
item.description: Nairobi — The Milimani Anti-Corruption Court has officially put former Nairobi Governor Mike Sonko on his defence regarding a 2018 corruption case linked to a county tender. Magistrate Isabella Barasa...

item.title: Three People Killed in Residential Fire in Gumaca, Quezon
item.description: GUMACA, Quezon, Philippines — A tragic fire occurred in a residential area in Barangay Villa Bota, Gumaca, Quezon, claiming the lives of three individuals: Rolly Paril, 48, his partner Tin, and a mino...

item.title: Congress identifies three potential Chief Minister candidates if UDF wins Kerala elections
item.description: Veteran Congress leader PJ Kurien has clarified that the Congress party in Kerala has multiple capable leaders, but currently only three are seriously being considered for the Chief Minister position ...

item.title: Security Breach at Washington Hilton Shows Challenges for US Hotels
item.description: On 2nd May 2026, a security incident occurred at the Washington Hilton during the White House Correspondents’ Association dinner, where US President Donald Trump was present. A man, identified as Cole...

item.title: Schofield Triumphs at Simola Hillclimb's Classic Car Friday
item.description: The 16th Simola Hillclimb kicked off with thrilling action on Classic Car Friday, where Ian Schofield claimed the top spot in the Classic Conqueror Top 10 Shootout. Piloting his 1977 March 77B Formula...

item.title: Michael Jackson Biopic ‘Michael’ Achieves Record-Breaking Global Box Office Opening
item.description: The Michael Jackson biopic, titled 'Michael', has made a massive splash in cinemas worldwide, earning $217.4 million during its opening weekend, making it the biggest live-action debut of 2026. In Nor...

item.title: Saudi Arabia restricts Hajj 2026 for pilgrims under 15 years of age
item.description: Saudi Arabia has announced a new regulation for Hajj 2026, stating that no pilgrim below the age of 15 will be allowed to enter the Kingdom for Hajj. The Ministry of Religious Affairs and Pakistan Air...

item.title: China moves to counter US sanctions on five domestic oil refineries over Iran trade
item.description: China’s Ministry of Commerce has taken a firm stance against recent United States sanctions targeting five Chinese oil refineries accused of purchasing Iranian crude. According to state media, the min...

item.title: Highlights of the Top 7 Beauty Looks at Miss Universe Philippines 2026
item.description: Metro.Style covered the most stunning beauty looks from the Miss Universe Philippines 2026 competition, highlighting the top seven contestants' unique styles and makeup choices. The article features a...

item.title: Fire Razes Sokoto NLC Secretariat, Union Loses Important Files and Equipment
item.description: Early Saturday morning, people for Sokoto wake up to serious gbege as fire don destroy the Sokoto State secretariat of the Nigeria Labour Congress (NLC). The fire start around 3:00 a.m., just one day ...

item.title: Family mourns the tragic death of Kumanjayi Little Baby as authorities prepare charges
item.description: Kumanjayi Little Baby, a five-year-old Warlpiri girl from Alice Springs, was found dead on Thursday evening, five days after going missing from her bed in the Old Timers town camp. Her Gurindji family...

item.title: Tanzania prepares for Africa Aquatics Swimming Championships with top swimmers
item.description: Dar es Salaam. Collins Saliboko, Tanzania’s leading male swimmer, is set to join the national swimming squad in Oran, Algeria ahead of the 2026 Africa Aquatics Swimming Championships from May 5 to 10....

item.title: Kenya's Fight Against Illicit Alcohol Trade Costing the Economy Billions
item.description: Kenya is facing an alarming annual loss of over KSh 120 billion due to the growing illicit alcohol trade, a situation that is significantly impacting both the economy and public health. This issue was...

item.title: Boko Haram Threatens Lives of 416 Women and Children After 72-Hour Deadline Expires in Borno
item.description: One faction of Boko Haram wey dey operate under Imam Abu Umaima Al-Muhajir don declare say the 72-hour ultimatum wey dem give Nigerian government don finish. For a video wey SaharaReporters get, the s...

item.title: North West shows off bold new look at her debut album release party
item.description: North West, the 12-year-old daughter of Kanye West and Kim Kardashian, stunned fans with her bold new appearance, including bleached eyebrows and black grillz, at a pop-up event for the launch of her ...

item.title: Comelec Accredits 21 Sectoral Organizations for BARMM Parliamentary Election
item.description: The Commission on Elections (Comelec) has accredited 21 sectoral organizations to participate in the first parliamentary election of the Bangsamoro Autonomous Region in Muslim Mindanao (BARMM). Initia...

item.title: CM Murad issues heatwave advisory for Sindh's central and upper regions
item.description: Sindh's Chief Minister, Murad Ali Shah, has advised the public to take necessary precautions as a heatwave warning has been issued for the central and upper regions of the province. According to the P...

item.title: Lando Norris Triumphs in Miami Grand Prix Sprint as McLaren Takes Top Two
item.description: Lando Norris claimed victory in the Miami Grand Prix sprint race on Saturday, giving McLaren a dominant one-two finish with teammate Oscar Piastri. The race marked the first defeat of the season for M...
